name: qa-workflow
description: End-to-end QA testing workflow plugin: analyze requirements → create test cases → prepare test data → review quality → execute tests → generate reports

commands.name: qa-workflow init
commands.description: Initialize new QA project and configure Jira integration (optional)

commands.name: qa-workflow analyze
commands.description: Analyze requirements and identify test scenarios

commands.name: qa-workflow create-tests
commands.description: Generate test cases from requirements using Test Case Generation Skill

commands.name: qa-workflow prepare-data
commands.description: Create and organize test data using Test Data Management Skill

commands.name: qa-workflow review
commands.description: Quality review of test cases (QA Lead gate) using Coverage & Quality Review Skill

commands.name: qa-workflow execute
commands.description: Execute tests and track results using Execution & Reporting Skill

commands.name: qa-workflow report
commands.description: Generate test execution report using Execution & Reporting Skill

agents.name: qa-engineer
agents.description: QA Engineer executor persona - performs test creation, data preparation, and execution

agents.name: qa-lead
agents.description: QA Lead reviewer persona - reviews quality and coverage of test cases

skills.name: coverage-review
skills.description: Quality and coverage review of test cases
